items.author: Zara Zhang
items.content_zh: Zara 提出 AI 时代人类沟通的三大核心用途：决定做什么以及「好」的标准是什么、陪伴彼此防止孤独和建立同志情谊、创意头脑风暴。项目同步、状态更新、交接等任务将由 agent 接管。同时指出最高效的人类协作方式是「不协作」——一个人端到端负责，配合 agent 工作。
items.content_en: Zara argues human communication in the AI era serves three core purposes: deciding what to work on and what 'good' looks like, keeping each other company to prevent loneliness, and creative brainstorming. Project syncs, status updates, and handovers will be handled by agents. Also proposes the most efficient collaboration is 'don't collaborate' — one person owns things end-to-end, working with agents.

items.author: Thariq
items.content_zh: Claude Code 现在有了 TurboTax 连接器，可以直接在终端中处理报税事务。Thariq 调侃说庆幸自己一直拖着没报税。
items.content_en: Claude Code now has a TurboTax connector, letting you handle tax filing right from the terminal. Thariq jokes he's glad he procrastinated on his taxes.

items.author: Peter Steinberger
items.content_zh: Steinberger 发布 OpenClaw 重大更新：harness 现在可以作为插件替换，意味着可以轻松将默认 Pi harness 替换为 Anthropic SDK 或自定义实现。同时推出两个实验性功能：1）Strict Mode 强制 GPT-5.x 持续工作而非停在「这是计划」；2）原生 Codex 作为 OpenClaw harness，让 Codex 接管线程管理、恢复和压缩。
items.content_en: Steinberger announces a major OpenClaw update: harnesses can now be plugins, making it trivial to swap the default Pi harness for Anthropic's SDK or custom implementations. Also introduces two experiments: 1) Strict Mode forcing GPT-5.x to keep working instead of stopping at 'here's the plan'; 2) Native Codex as OpenClaw harness, letting Codex own threads, resume, compaction, and app-server execution.

items.author: Guillermo Rauch
items.content_zh: Vercel Sandbox 成为最快的基于 microVM 的沙箱环境。无论是 OpenClaw、coding agent 还是并行计算，Vercel 认为这是新世界的基础设施。客户迁移反馈显示其真实场景下的性能和可靠性无可匹敌。
items.content_en: Vercel Sandbox is now the fastest microVM-based sandbox. Whether for OpenClaw, coding agents, or compute parallelism, Vercel sees this as the foundation of the new world. Customer migration feedback confirms unmatched real-world performance and reliability.

items.author: Nikunj Kothari
items.content_zh: Nikunj 批评了 VC 行业的「markup 文化」：同一个 VC 先以低估值投资口头承诺长期陪跑，6 个月后却催促创始人接受最高估值以向 LP 展示 markup。提醒创始人远离只关心账面回报的投资人。
items.content_en: Nikunj critiques VC 'markup culture': the same VC who pushed for a low valuation citing long-term conviction, 6 months later pushes for the highest valuation to show marks to LPs. Warns founders to avoid VCs who only care about paper markups.

items.author: Matt Turck
items.bio: FirstMark Capital VC, MAD Podcast host
items.content_zh: Matt Turck 引用观点：AI 客服领域的供应商数量已经多到可以认为这是一个「已解决的问题」，暗示该赛道竞争已经饱和。
items.content_en: Matt Turck shares the take that there are so many AI customer service vendors that it's 'basically a solved problem' — signaling the space is saturated with competition.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 提出反直觉观点：AI 时代律师会更多而非更少。原因有三：AI 让更多人能提出法律问题从而需要真人律师验证执行；AI 产生大量新型法律条款需要审核；AI 本身在各行业带来全新的法律领域（IP、合规、监管）。
items.content_en: Levie makes a counterintuitive argument: AI will create more lawyers, not fewer. Three reasons: AI enables more people to ask legal questions requiring human verification; AI generates exotic new legal terms needing review; and AI itself creates entirely new areas of law (IP, compliance, regulation) across every industry.

items.author: Aaron Levie
items.content_zh: Levie 用数据中心资本支出图表说明 AI 需求的规模：亚马逊过去 3 年的资本支出超过了此前全部历史。当前大部分 AI 使用集中在 token 效率较高的聊天工具上，但 coding agent 的 token 消耗量高出数个数量级，而这种模式即将扩展到所有知识工作领域。
items.content_en: Levie uses datacenter capex charts to illustrate AI demand scale: Amazon's capex in the last 3 years exceeds its entire history. Most AI usage today is token-efficient chat tools, but coding agents consume orders of magnitude more tokens and this pattern is about to hit all knowledge work.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 分享了通过与 Claw 聊天学习语音系统延迟和构建知识的体验，展示了 AI agent 作为教育工具的强大潜力。
items.content_en: Garry Tan shares how chatting with the Claw provided a powerful education on voice system latency and architecture, demonstrating AI agents' potential as learning tools.

items.author: Garry Tan
items.content_zh: Garry Tan 在开源 3 个月、每天被数万 agentic 工程师使用后，提出「Thin Harness, Fat Skills」架构哲学：harness 应该是薄薄的导体，只负责读取文件；memory 是 markdown，skills 是 markdown，brain 是 git repo。如果你的 harness 死了记忆就丢失，说明你的 harness 建得太厚了。
items.content_en: After 3 months of open source used by tens of thousands of agentic engineers daily, Garry Tan proposes the 'Thin Harness, Fat Skills' architecture: the harness should be a thin conductor that reads files, not owns them. Memory is markdown, skills are markdown, brain is a git repo. If your memory dies when your harness dies, you built it too thick.

items.author: Aditya Agarwal
items.bio: South Park Commons GP, ex-Dropbox CTO
items.content_zh: Agarwal 指出真正的「agent」与简单的 LLM 循环或事件触发之间的核心区别在于：智能的长时间记忆管理。Claude Code 架构中最有趣的部分正是其三层记忆架构。
items.content_en: Agarwal identifies the key difference between a true 'agent' and simply running an LLM in a loop: intelligent long-horizon memory management. The most interesting aspect of Claude Code's architecture is its 3-tier memory system.
